methods.description: The thin film oven test (TFOT) was employed to simulate the short-term oxidation that occurs during the mixing process in accordance with ASTM D1754.

steps.description: Asphalt with a weight of 50 g was placed in an iron pan, which was set on the tray such that the axis of revolution was vertical.
steps.searchable_summary: place 50 g of asphalt in an iron pan on a vertical axis tray

steps.description: The oven was kept at 163 °C, and the trays were rotated in the oven at a rate of 5.5 rpm for 5 h.
steps.searchable_summary: rotate trays in oven at 163 °C at 5.5 rpm for 5 hours

methods.description: Aging mechanism of a diatomite-modified asphalt binder using Fourier-Transform Infrared (FTIR) Spectroscopy Analysis.
